data.content: Shipped approved implementation from impl/foolery-5fc1 by merging commit ab19e0fb1dff into origin/main as merge commit 7afe39ea6273. Remote workflows passed on the shipped commit: CI run 23292655779 and Coverage Badge run 23292655777. GitHub Actions reported non-blocking annotations for Node.js 20 action deprecation and a coverage regression warning, but the CI workflow concluded success.
